why: The owner explicitly states linguistic and technical meanings should be separated.
The شرعي/technical layer is its own meaning and should not be collapsed into the linguistic layer.
why_not_other_treatments: Adjacency or shortness do not make them one subject.

why: The owner indicates school-specific meaning often belongs under technical as a branch, not as a mere attachment.
why_not_other_treatments: Auto-merging with generic technical meaning hides school-specific distinction.

layer_label: school-specific meaning when merely adopting the same technical meaning
why: The owner is not settled that every school-specific mention is a new definition; some may be mere attribution.
why_not_other_treatments: Creating a new definition entry here may overstate distinction.
